scripts.build: npm --workspace @dnd/types run build && npm --workspace @dnd/env run build && npm --workspace @dnd/db run build && npm --workspace @dnd/ui run build && npm --workspace @dnd/web run build
scripts.test: node scripts/validate-workspace.mjs && node scripts/validate-repository-guardrails.mjs && node scripts/validate-auth.mjs && node scripts/validate-pwa-shell.mjs && node scripts/validate-database.mjs && node scripts/validate-campaign-access.mjs && node scripts/validate-campaign-dashboard.mjs && node scripts/validate-campaign-creation.mjs && node scripts/validate-campaign-onboarding.mjs && node scripts/validate-campaign-invites.mjs && node scripts/validate-entities.mjs && node scripts/validate-entity-backlinks.mjs && node scripts/validate-sessions.mjs && node scripts/validate-session-recaps.mjs && node scripts/validate-rules.mjs && node scripts/validate-wiki-links.mjs && node scripts/validate-campaign-memory.mjs && node scripts/validate-vendor-integrations.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @dnd/types run typecheck && npm --workspace @dnd/env run typecheck && npm --workspace @dnd/db run typecheck && npm --workspace @dnd/ui run typecheck && npm --workspace @dnd/web run typecheck
